/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libnero_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/nero_msgs/libnero_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/nero_msgs/msg/_nero_status_msg_s.c.o CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/nero_msgs/msg/_pos_cmd_s.c.o CMakeFiles/nero_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/nero_msgs/srv/_enable_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dx/ws_/PikaAnyArm/build/nero_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libnero_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libnero_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
